# FileUp

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="FileUp icon">

<div class="dioxus-icons-widget" data-icon-name="FileUp" data-svg="&lt;svg xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot; width=&quot;24&quot; height=&quot;24&quot; viewBox=&quot;0 0 24 24&quot; 12v6&quot;&gt;&lt;/path&gt;&lt;path d=&quot;m15 15-3-3-3 3&quot;&gt;&lt;/path&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;" data-size="24" data-color="#000000" data-stroke="2"><div class="dioxus-icons-widget-header"><div class="dioxus-icons-widget-preview" data-di-preview="true" aria-label="FileUp preview"><img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="FileUp icon"></div><div class="dioxus-icons-widget-controls"><label><span class="dioxus-icons-widget-label">Size</span><input data-di-size="true" type="number" min="1" max="256" value="24"></label><label><span type="number" min="1" max="12" value="2"></label></div></div><div class="dioxus-icons-widget-output"><pre class="dioxus-icons-widget-code dxc dxc-system dxc-system-light-github-light class="a-p">:</span><span> </span><span class="a-co">24</span><span class="a-p">,</span><span> </span><span class="a-pr">stroke</span><span class="a-p">:</span><span> </span><span class="a-s">&quot;#000000&quot;</span><span class="a-p">,</span><span> </span><span class="a-pr">stroke_width</span><span class="a-p">:</span><span> </span><span class="a-co">2</span><span> data-di-copy-label="true">Copy RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::FileUp;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        FileUp { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
upload, import, export

## Categories
files, arrows

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/file-up)
